---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability docbt should grow
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**

What can't you do today, and what kind of data / workflow are you trying to
support?

**The proposed change**

What you think docbt should add or change. YAML examples welcome.

**Alternatives considered**

Other tools / approaches you've tried, and why they don't fit.

**Out of scope?**

If you think this might be a v2 / not-v1 feature, say so — helps us
prioritize against the existing roadmap.
